entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop studied for transpiration response and growth across different rainfall environments

entities.name: VAPOR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture the air can hold at saturation and the amount of moisture actually present

entities.name: SOIL DRYING
entities.description: The reduction of water content in the soil affecting plant water availability

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water movement through a plant and its evaporation from aerial parts

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant uses water for growth and production

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation in a given area, used to define agro-ecological zones

entities.name: AGRO-ECOLOGICAL ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Zones characterized by specific environmental conditions, particularly rainfall levels

entities.name: PARENTAL LINES
entities.description: Pure lines used as parents in the breeding of hybrids

entities.name: F1-HYBRIDS
entities.description: First-generation offspring resulting from the cross of two different parental lines

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RESPONSE
entities.description: The plant's physiological reaction to changes in vapor pressure deficit and soil moisture

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the leaves of a plant

entities.name: DRY MATTER
entities.description: The mass of the plant after all water has been removed

entities.name: LEAF THICKNESS
entities.description: The thickness of the leaf blade

entities.name: ROOT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth and structural expansion of the root system

entities.name: EXUDATION
entities.description: The secretion of substances from the roots into the surrounding soil

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The total length of the root system

entities.name: ROOT/SHOOT INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of root biomass to shoot biomass

entities.name: TILLER DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The production and growth of side shoots from the main stem

entities.name: BIOMASS DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The overall accumulation of organic matter in the plant

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: A controlled environment used for growing plants, characterized here by low VPD

entities.name: OUTDOORS
entities.description: The natural environment where plants are grown, characterized here by high VPD
